questions.rationale:
Slide 13: Protective Environment Isolation
Used for patients who are not communicable but have high susceptibility to infection, such as a neutropenic patient or hematopoietic stem cell transplant (HSCT) recipient
Strict adherence to standard or transmission-based precautions is required at all times; this includes any visitors
